textPlain: It gets worse.I payed the one off 299$ for a pro license but have yet to find a reason to use any of the pro features.I was hoping to need them for  the google sheets clone [1] I was building but I seem to be able to do it without PRO features.- [1] https://cells.andersmurphy.com/
Odd statement from a doctor using this at his practice:"It is not like $299 is much for me, but I am just a hobbist."
I don't understand. Why is it a problem with Datastar if you buy their Pro license without needing it?
Arguably that's good though - for the project. It means it's not a bait and switch like many have claimed. You can build pretty much anything with regular Datastar.
i'm afraid this is rather the quality of a non native writer, sorry we are not all from the mother US of A
